title: ACT values exercise

steps.title: Life area
steps.body: Choose the area you want to reconnect with.

steps.title: Value word
steps.body: Pick one word that describes how you want to show up.

steps.title: Why it matters
steps.body: Write why this value matters to you.

steps.title: Tiny action
steps.body: Choose one action that expresses this value today.

completionPrompt: Values are directions, not pass/fail tests.
